ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(TEXT(SBQQ__Status__c) = 'Ordered', BEGINS(NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, 'NATT_Units'), TEXT($User.UserType) <> 'Standard', OR(ISCHANGED(NATT_End_Customer__c), ISCHANGED(NATT_Stock__c), ISCHANGED(NATT_Market_Segment2__c), ISCHANGED(NATT_Shipment_Method__c), ISCHANGED(NATT_Purchase_Order__c), ISCHANGED(NATT_Dealer_Comments__c), ISCHANGED(NATT_Mark_For_Special_Delivery_Instructi__c) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not update any of this field (End Customer, Stock, Market Segment, and Shipment Method, Purchase Order #, Dealer Comments, and Mark For Special Delivery Instructions) because the quote was already ordered.
